Package me.itzloghotxd.nbt

Interface Tag<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of the underlying value this tag holds (e.g., Integer, String, List)
All Superinterfaces:
Cloneable, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractTag
public interface Tag<T> extends Serializable, Cloneable
The Tag interface represents a generic Named Binary Tag (NBT) element. NBT is a binary format designed to store data in a compact and structured way, commonly used for saving structured data.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
ItzLoghotXD

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NotNull Tag<T>
    clone()
    Creates a deep copy of this tag.
    void
    deserialize(@NotNull DataInput input)
    Deserializes data from the specified input into this tag.

    getName()
    Gets the name of this tag.
    @NotNull TagType
    getType()
    Gets the type of this tag.
    T
    getValue()
    Gets the value stored in this tag.
    void
    serialize(@NotNull DataOutput output)
    Serializes this tag's payload to the specified output.

    Sets the name of this tag.
    void

    Sets the value of this tag.
    @NotNull String
    toJson()
    Converts the tag and its contents into a JSON string representation.

  • Method Details

    • getType

      @NotNull @NotNull TagType getType()
      Gets the type of this tag.
      Returns:
      The TagType of this tag

    • getName

      @Nullable @Nullable String getName()
      Gets the name of this tag. In some contexts, like elements inside a ListTag, the name may be null.
      Returns:
      The name of the tag, or null if unnamed

    • setName

      void setName(@Nullable @Nullable String name)
      Sets the name of this tag.
      Parameters:
      name - The new name for this tag, can be null

    • getValue

      @NotNull T getValue()
      Gets the value stored in this tag.
      Returns:
      The non-null value

    • setValue

      void setValue(@NotNull T value)
      Sets the value of this tag.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value, must not be null

    • serialize

      void serialize(@NotNull @NotNull DataOutput output) throws IOException
      Serializes this tag's payload to the specified output.
      Parameters:
      output - The data output to write to
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during writing

    • deserialize

      void deserialize(@NotNull @NotNull DataInput input) throws IOException
      Deserializes data from the specified input into this tag.
      Parameters:
      input - The data input to read from
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during reading

    • clone

      @NotNull @NotNull Tag<T> clone()
      Creates a deep copy of this tag.
      Returns:
      A new, independent tag instance containing the same data

    • toJson

      @NotNull @NotNull String toJson()
      Converts the tag and its contents into a JSON string representation.
      Returns:
      A non-null JSON string
